title: Byju's is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Byju's is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Byju's in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Byju's:
Byju's is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's!
